page.title: Scans
page.subtitle: Scan queue across the projects you can access.
page.empty: No scans match the current filter.

progress.title: Scan in progress
progress.cancelled_notice: This scan was cancelled. Any in-progress work has been stopped.
progress.background_notice: Scan continues in the background — you can close this panel.

confirm.title: Cancel scan
confirm.message: Cancel this scan? Any in-progress work will be stopped and the scan will be marked as cancelled.

errors.already_terminal: This scan already finished and can no longer be cancelled.
errors.not_found: This scan no longer exists or you no longer have access to it.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to cancel this scan.
errors.unknown: Could not cancel the scan. Please try again.

alerts.dt_unavailable: The vulnerability matcher is temporarily unavailable. Showing cached results.

container.label: Container image
container.hint: Trivy scans the image's OS packages for vulnerabilities, e.g. ghcr.io/org/app:1.2.3.
container.subtitle: Scan a container image for {{project}} with Trivy.

errors.image_required: Enter an image reference to scan.

release.label: Release / version
release.hint: Optional. Tags this scan with a release label, e.g. v1.2.3.

verbose.label: Verbose logs (debug)
verbose.hint: Stream the full cdxgen / scancode / Trivy diagnostic trace into the scan log. Useful when debugging a scan.

source.title: Start a scan
source.subtitle: Choose how to provide the source for {{project}}.

git.label: Configured Git URL
git.missing: This project has no Git URL. Upload a .zip or select a folder instead, or add a Git URL in project settings.
git.credential_configured: Private credential configured — used at clone time.
git.credential_missing_prefix: Cloned as a public repository. For a private repo, add a token in

folder.label: Project folder
folder.hint: The folder is zipped in your browser before upload, up to {{max}}.
folder.too_large: The selected folder exceeds the {{max}} limit. Remove large directories and try again.
folder.noisy: Large directories detected: {{dirs}}. These will inflate the upload — consider excluding them.

errors.too_large: The archive is too large. The limit is 100 MiB.
errors.quota_exceeded: This project has reached its storage quota.
errors.bad_request: The upload could not be processed.
errors.network: Upload failed due to a network error. Please try again.
errors.unknown: The upload failed. Please try again.

close_codes.auth_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
close_codes.forbidden: You no longer have access to this scan.

errors.not_found: No conformance verdict is available for this scan yet.
errors.network: Could not load the conformance verdict due to a network error.
errors.unknown: Could not load the conformance verdict.
